title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
summary: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
briefing: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
summary: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
briefing: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
summary: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
briefing: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
summary: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
briefing: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
summary: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
briefing: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.

title: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
summary: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
briefing: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.

title: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
summary: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
briefing: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply fell 15% in Q2 as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted, while Treasury-backed products including BUIDL, USYC and USDY continued to grow.

title: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
summary: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
briefing: FBI Director Kash Patel failed to disclose a significant purchase of stock in Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy from last November.

title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
summary: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
briefing: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.

title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
summary: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
briefing: The Japanese firm's 43,000-BTC stack now sits well below its cost basis, and it has leaned on debt over equity to keep buying.

title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Debuts 'Robinhood Chain'
briefing: The market liked it with HOOD shares jumping 8% and their crypto perp dex partner up even more. Plus crypto's latest unicorn is crowned.

title: Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom Demand
summary: Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom Demand
briefing: The teenager allegedly helped to breach a luxury jeweler and demand $8 million in crypto, as part of a crew tied to $100 million in ransoms.

title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
summary: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
briefing: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

title: Venice AI Valued at $1 Billion as Erik Voorhees Makes the Case for Private ChatGPT Rivals
summary: Venice AI Valued at $1 Billion as Erik Voorhees Makes the Case for Private ChatGPT Rivals
briefing: Venice reached a $1 billion valuation as founder Erik Voorhees argued AI companies should protect users' conversations.

title: LongCat-2.0: The Stealth AI Model That Was Quietly Topping OpenRouter All Along
summary: LongCat-2.0: The Stealth AI Model That Was Quietly Topping OpenRouter All Along
briefing: The 1.6 trillion-parameter mixture-of-experts model spent two months disguised as "Owl Alpha" before Meituan claimed it—and it undercuts GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet 5 on price by a wide margin.
